requirement_topic.en: DGSM Standards and Oman Market Scope Check
requirement_topic.zh: DGSM标准及阿曼市场适用范围核查
requirement_topic.zht: DGSM標準及阿曼市場適用範圍核查

summary.en: Oman's Directorate General for Standards and Metrology is the national standards and conformity authority under the Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Investment Promotion. For EV chargers, exporters should confirm whether the exact product, cable assembly, connector, meter, communication module, label, or low-voltage electrical equipment scope is covered by a current Oman standard, Gulf technical regulation, DGSM conformity route, customs control, or buyer tender before shipment.
summary.zh: 阿曼标准计量总局隶属于商业、工业和投资促进部，是国家标准与合格评定主管机构。对于电动汽车充电桩，出口商应在出货前确认具体产品、电缆组件、连接器、计量装置、通信模块、标签或低压电气设备范围是否落入现行阿曼标准、海湾技术法规、DGSM合格评定路径、海关管制或买方招标要求。
summary.zht: 阿曼標準計量總局隸屬於商業、工業和投資促進部，是國家標準與合格評定主管機構。對於電動汽車充電樁，出口商應在出貨前確認具體產品、電纜組件、連接器、計量裝置、通訊模組、標籤或低壓電氣設備範圍是否落入現行阿曼標準、海灣技術法規、DGSM合格評定路徑、海關管制或買方招標要求。

standards_or_laws: Oman technical regulations applicable by product scope
GCC or Gulf technical regulations adopted or applied in Oman where relevant
Project tender, importer, and customs documentation requirements

summary.en: China-market charger files usually include GB/T 18487, GB/T 20234, GB/T 27930, Chinese labels, factory inspection records, and domestic test reports. These materials help technical review but do not establish that DGSM, Oman customs, an importer, or a project owner has accepted the product scope or documentation route.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩资料通常包括GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234、GB/T 27930、中文标签、工厂检验记录和国内测试报告。这些材料可支持技术审查，但不能证明DGSM、阿曼海关、进口商或项目业主已接受产品范围或文件路径。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁資料通常包括GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234、GB/T 27930、中文標籤、工廠檢驗記錄和國內測試報告。這些材料可支持技術審查，但不能證明DGSM、阿曼海關、進口商或項目業主已接受產品範圍或文件路徑。

gap.en: Treat DGSM scope confirmation as an entry task. Prepare product classification, HS code, nameplate ratings, connector type, installation use case, labels, Arabic or English manuals where required, and existing GB/T or IEC reports, then verify whether Oman requires a specific conformity document, local importer filing, or project-level acceptance.
gap.zh: 应将DGSM适用范围确认为准入前置事项。准备产品分类、HS编码、铭牌额定值、接口类型、安装用途、标签、按需提供的阿拉伯语或英语说明书以及既有GB/T或IEC报告，然后核验阿曼是否要求特定合格文件、本地进口商备案或项目级认可。
gap.zht: 應將DGSM適用範圍確認為准入前置事項。準備產品分類、HS編碼、銘牌額定值、接口類型、安裝用途、標籤、按需提供的阿拉伯語或英語說明書以及既有GB/T或IEC報告，然後核驗阿曼是否要求特定合格文件、本地進口商備案或項目級認可。

mandatory_status.target: Scope-dependent: mandatory where an Oman technical regulation, DGSM conformity route, Gulf regulation, customs control, tender, or importer requirement applies
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T documentation is domestic technical evidence and does not by itself establish Oman market acceptance

source.publisher: Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Investment Promotion, Oman

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume that a China GB/T charger file is sufficient for Oman until the DGSM, customs, importer, and project-documentation route has been checked.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在核查DGSM、海关、进口商和项目文件路径前，不应假设中国GB/T充电桩资料足以进入阿曼。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在核查DGSM、海關、進口商和項目文件路徑前，不應假設中國GB/T充電樁資料足以進入阿曼。
